3079670.name: Escape From The Core
3079670.description:
Welcome on Escape From The Core! Get ready to experience an intense 1 vs 4 multiplayer assymetrical game, where every move could mean the difference between life and death.

Try our BETA version (SOON) and give us your feedback about the game to help us improving it.

As a survivor, You will need to repair generators all around the map to turn on the electricity to escape, Use everything you can find on the map to stay alive and defend yourself. Will you make it out alive, or will the killer claim another victim?

But beware, as the Hunter, your goal is to hunt down and eliminate the survivors before they can escape. You must use every tool at your disposal, to gain an edge over your prey. Will you emerge victorious, or will the survivors evade your grasp?

Collect Gold Coin as you play and unlock new characters, profile icons, and other exciting rewards! And with a Quick Match system that lets you jump into the action in seconds, and a complete lobby creation/search system, you'll always find plenty of players to battle it out with.

So come on in and join the action soon! Whether you're playing alone or with friends, Escape From The core offers a chill and immersive gaming experience that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Don't wait, start playing today!

WishList

And if you haven't added Escape from The Core to your wishlist yet, be sure to do so to stay in the loop on all the latest developments and updates. With new content and features being added all the time, you won't want to miss a thing!
